ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution And Report On Tax Problems
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Tom Huster appearing for the Shimmons, trustee. Everybody has signed off on the three orders. Counsel is requesting to have the three orders signed. On the distribution issue, Mr. Huster will file the canceled checks and the bank statement. Court is satified and receipts are not required. At 10:37am, Birgit Jarson appearing by phone for Sheila Lundquist. The tax issue is continued to 7/17 at 9am for status. Ms. Jarson is allowed to appear by phone. Three orders signed in open court.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution And Report On Tax Problems
Off Calendar May-01-2007 Continued To Jun-12-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Tom Huster appearing for co-trustees. Birgit Jarson appearing by phone for Sheila Lundquist. Ms. Jagiello is not in court. The examiner has raised a notice issue to the grandson. Mr. Huster will send a new notice to Malek. The trustees did make distribution. They will provide the accounting to the beneficaries this week and submit the accounting to the court in two weeks. Matter is continued to 6/12 at 10:30am. Ms. Jarson is allowed to appear by phone.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution And Report On Tax Problems
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Continued To May-01-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution And Report On Tax Problems
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Continued To Apr-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Of Third Party Law Suit
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Barbara Jagiello appearing for beneficiary Elizabeth Shimmon. Tom Huster and John Huster appearing for trustees Kenneth and Phyllis Shimmon. Birgit Jarsen appearing by phone for petitioner and objector Sheila Lundquist. Mr. Huster requested the approval of the 1st account. With no objection, 1st accounting is approved. On settlement of suit against the decedent, with no objection, petition is approved. On removal and replacement of trustee, oral argument presented. Petition is denied without prejudice. Status date is set on 3/20 to make sure partial distribution is made and to report on tax problems. Mr. Huster will prepare three orders.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.
